home.bio: I'm a software engineer specializing in iOS and backend development. I build user-focused mobile apps with SwiftUI and scalable, secure backend services with Spring Boot and Node.js. I actively work on advanced security topics like JWT authentication, end-to-end encryption, and real-time communication. I'm proficient in DevOps workflows including Docker and containerization — I believe clean architecture and maintainable code are the foundation of every great project.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm a software engineer specializing in iOS and backend development. I design and build production-ready, scalable applications using SwiftUI, Spring Boot, and Node.js. I have hands-on experience with DevOps workflows including containerization and deployment. I focus on clean architecture, system design, and building secure, maintainable software systems.

bullets: Developed a full-stack application using Angular (frontend) and Node.js (backend)
Designed a document search system using Elasticsearch with full-text search over PDF files
Implemented end-to-end encryption (E2EE) using AES-GCM and ECDH key exchange
Containerized services using Docker and configured development environments
Conducted practical implementations in network security and secure communication protocols
Implemented SSL control mechanisms to ensure secure communications
Developed high-performance, scalable mobile applications using Swift
Designed user-friendly interfaces using SwiftUI and UIKit
Built applications following MVVM and MVC architectural patterns
Implemented data management and performance optimizations using CoreData and Realm
Participated in the full lifecycle of App Store deployment and release processes

ee.degree: Double Major in Electrical & Electronics Engineering

notiva.subtitle: iOS · Backend · DevOps
notiva.description: A comprehensive mobile application that consolidates note-taking, task management, planning, and personal organization in one place. Personal data is securely protected with end-to-end encrypted storage and a cloud synchronization infrastructure.

tripmate.subtitle: iOS · Backend · DevOps
tripmate.description: A travel planning application designed for users to create travel plans and organize their trips. It simplifies the travel experience with day-based itinerary planning, city and route creation, place recommendations, and location-based planning.

eczanem.subtitle: iOS
eczanem.description: A mobile application that allows users to view on-duty pharmacies in real time based on their location. Provides map visualization, location-based filtering, and quick access to pharmacy contact information.

chat.subtitle: Backend · Security
chat.description: A system designed to develop real-time messaging and secure communication infrastructure. Provides end-to-end encryption (E2EE) with AES-GCM, ECDH, and ECDSA cryptographic protocols; supports instant messaging, DM system, and multi-device usage.
features: Message read receipts and typing indicators
AES-GCM, ECDH, ECDSA, HKDF cryptographic chain

restlocations.subtitle: iOS · Backend
restlocations.description: A mobile platform for travelers to discover hotels, campsites, and caravan accommodation spots. Offers a comprehensive accommodation solution with map integration, location-based search, and travel route creation.
features: Hotels, campsites and caravan spots listing

auth.subtitle: Backend · DevOps
auth.description: A centralized user management and authentication service usable by multiple applications. Provides a production-ready authentication infrastructure with email verification, JWT/refresh token management, Redis-based token blacklist, and Thymeleaf HTML email templates.

kroki.subtitle: Frontend · FullStack
kroki.description: A web-based system that enables location and area data to be managed on a schematic map. Offers an enterprise-ready platform with dynamic data visualization, area and point management, location marking, and admin panel integration.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Feel free to reach out for any project, collaboration, or question through the channels below. Email is preferred for the fastest response.
